title: coronilla glauca subsp. pentaphylla
intro: Coronilla glauca subsp. pentaphylla, also known as the pentaphylla clover or pentaphylla crown-vetch, is a plant species within the family Fabaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to alleviate symptoms of various conditions, such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. Coronilla glauca subsp. pentaphylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
